# AI Unfiltered - Full Article List

> This file contains recent AI news articles for consumption by LLMs and AI agents.
> Updated every 4 hours. Links to original sources.

### Huawei's Tau Law Redefines Chip Scaling: Logic Folding as the Post-Dennard Path to 1.4nm
- Source: Pandaily
- Category: chinese-ai
- URL: https://pandaily.com/huawei-tau-law-logic-folding-post-dennard-scaling-may2026
- Summary: At the 2026 ISCAS in Shanghai, Huawei Board Director He Tingbo introduced the Tau Law — a new semiconductor scaling framework centered on temporal minimization through logic folding, targeting transistor densities equivalent to 1.4nm by 2031.

- Source: Anthropic Status
- Category: incidents
- URL: https://status.claude.com/incidents/6qbg6ft2r9j4
- Summary: May 18, 22:19 UTCResolved - The issue affecting Claude services has been resolved. Impact occurred from 21:47 to 22:18 UTC.May 18, 22:10 UTCInvestigating - We are investigating elevated errors on requests to Claude Opus 4.7. We will provide an update as soon as possible.
